Name: Dmitry Starchenko
aboutMeDescription:
Frontend Developer with experience in developing production-like SPAs and full-stack web applications on the React / TypeScript / Next.js ecosystem.

I work with a modern frontend stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, GraphQL, NestJS, PostgreSQL. I have experience in developing responsive interfaces, integrating REST/GraphQL APIs, configuring application architecture, testing and performance optimization.

I participated in team development using Agile, GitFlow and code review. I am comfortable working with both frontend and backend tasks.

I am interested in product teams and projects with a modern stack, where I can develop as a Frontend Engineer and participate in the development of production-ready solutions.
